functional_audit.check: Health flags step renders enum-driven options with multi-select and none-of-the-above exclusivity
Load signals step renders four question groups with required single selection per group
Completing results step persists onboarding and navigates to dashboard (bTHDT)

ui_evidence.notes: Onboarding page root marker on OnboardingWizardShell
bTHNF is a ButtonClicked workflow entity; parity is approximated via data-custom-state on health-flag option buttons rather than a workflow marker
Load-signal question labels use bTGNn (IR pointer leaf) instead of literal bTHNi id; inventory maps bTHNi to the bTGNn element path

gaps: Health draft persistence stores healthFlags booleans but does not emit a flat custom-state map parallel to loadSignalCustomStates

critiques.finding: ui_ref bTHNi expects a data-bubble-id='bTHNi' marker on load-signal question labels, but OnboardingLoadSignals tags labels with data-bubble-id='bTGNn'.
critiques.alternative: Add data-bubble-id='bTHNi' on the question label element (or dual-tag) so automated parity checks keyed to the decompose ui_ref pass without alias lookup.

critiques.finding: Workflow ui_ref bTHNF (health recovery toggle) has no data-workflow or equivalent workflow marker; only per-option data-custom-state attributes represent SetCustomState semantics.
critiques.alternative: Attach data-workflow='bTHNF' on the recovery health-flag option button or document workflow refs as satisfied by data-custom-state mapping.

critiques.finding: HealthFlagsPayload uses recovery_mode_active/grief_mode_active field names while Bubble custom states and DOM data-custom-state keys use health_recovery_mode_active and health_grief_mode_active (IR trailing-underscore variants).
critiques.alternative: Align persisted payload keys with Bubble custom_state:bTGNI:* names or add an explicit buildHealthCustomStates() helper mirroring buildLoadSignalCustomStates().

critiques.finding: Health and load step inner containers reuse shared template ids (bTHJm, bTHVW, bTHVi) from other onboarding steps rather than step-group-specific roots bTHtb/bTHnK on the component roots.
critiques.alternative: Step-group id bTHtb/bTHnK is correctly on the Onboarding.tsx wrapper; inner reuse is acceptable if parity tooling scopes to step wrapper.
